title: Design ChatThread component with auto-scroll and infinite scroll pagination
notes: Created temporary MessageBubble stub since US-013 is not yet complete
Uses NativeWind/Tailwind theme tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Implements inverted FlatList for newest-at-bottom display
Auto-scroll to bottom on new messages via useEffect + scrollToEnd
Loading indicator shown at top when isLoadingMore=true
Empty state component for zero messages
